meaning: n.收音机,无线电报,射线照相
examples: Objective:To evaluate the contribution of radiogram in diagnosis of primary vertical root facture in mandibular first molar.
From among the many things we were offered as a present, it was difficult to make up our minds which to have, but in the end we settled for a radiogram.
Results: 95 cases of major bronchopathy were proved to be correctly diagnosed by good tomography or high kilovoltage radiogram, the diagnostic accordance rate being 95%(95/100).
